# Best AI Code Review Tools for Developers in 2026

Code reviews are essential for quality software, but they're time-consuming. AI code review tools make them faster and more effective!

Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]]: AI-Powered Code Review

[[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] focuses specifically on code review and testing, helping you catch issues before they reach production.

### CodiumAI Features
- **Automated testing**: Generate tests automatically
- **Bug detection**: Find issues before they ship
- **Code analysis**: Deep understanding of your code

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: Code Review Assistance

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] includes code review features for teams using GitHub.

### Copilot for Code Review
- **Inline suggestions**: Real-time feedback as you code
- **Security alerts**: Catch vulnerabilities early
- **Code explanation**: Understand complex code

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]] | Testing & review | $19/mo |
| [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] | General coding | $10/mo |
| [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] | AI-first IDE | $20/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Testing focus**: Start with [[link:/tools/202|CodiumAI]]
- **General code review**: Use [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]
- **Full AI IDE**: Try [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]

Ready to review code smarter? Try these AI tools today!
